# Workspace Group configuration

[Download JSON Schema](/docs/schemas/workspace-group.schema.json)

## Example

```yaml
apiVersion: libredash.dev/v1
kind: WorkspaceGroup
metadata:
  workspace: operations
  name: operators
  title: Operations Team
spec:
  members:
    - email: operator@example.com
      displayName: Operations Operator
```
